The '''second moon of Tao-Grant''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Tao-Grant]]. It was home to a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base.<ref name="Droid Trouble" />

{{Moon-stub}}
